## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🏗️ Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] 🧪 Test update

## Checklist

- [ ] I've added tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works
- [ ] I've run `pnpm lint` and `pnpm build` with no errors
- [ ] I've run `pnpm test` and all tests pass
- [ ] I've added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if this affects the public API
- [ ] I've updated documentation if needed
